title: Device
description: Represents a device in the Aruba Central inventory including access points, switches, gateways, and SD-WAN appliances.

serial.description: Unique serial number of the device.

firmware_version.description: Current firmware version running on the device.

group_name.description: Name of the configuration group the device belongs to.

site.description: Name of the site the device is assigned to.

aruba_part_no.description: Aruba part number for the device hardware.

customer_id.description: Customer ID associated with the device.

customer_name.description: Customer name associated with the device.
